title: How to Apply for a WDA: MHRA Process
alt: Five-step process to apply for a WDA(H) with the MHRA

items.label: Register on the portal
items.desc: Set up your account on the MHRA Process Licensing Portal.

items.label: Complete application
items.desc: Declare sites, activities, categories and name your RP.

items.label: Pay statutory fee
items.desc: Settle the MHRA application and periodic fees.

items.label: Prepare for inspection
items.desc: Pass the pre-approval GDP inspection; respond with CAPA.

items.label: Receive authorisation
items.desc: WDA(H) granted and added to the public register.
